draft:
Dear Sir or Madam:

I am writing to provide my strongest recommendation for Mr. Jianli Zhao's O-1 visa petition. Mr. Zhao is a truly extraordinary individual whose remarkable skills and accomplishments in the field of software engineering and product development have left an indelible mark on the industry. His outstanding expertise and visionary contributions make him an invaluable asset to the United States.

As a Partner at Apex10 Ventures, a venture capital firm based in Los Angeles, I have had the privilege of working closely with Mr. Zhao and witnessing firsthand his extraordinary abilities and contributions. Apex10 Ventures focuses on investing in early-stage companies that are transforming traditional industries through automation and technology. Our portfolio includes innovative companies across various sectors, such as finance, healthcare, logistics, and education.

In my role as a Partner, I am responsible for sourcing, evaluating, and supporting our portfolio companies. I work closely with founders and management teams to help them scale their businesses and achieve their strategic goals. I also lead our due diligence efforts and provide guidance on product development, go-to-market strategy, and operational execution. Prior to joining Apex10 Ventures, I gained extensive experience in venture capital and technology investing through my roles at Linkbridge Capital and Athena Consulting. At Linkbridge Capital, I was a Principal focused on early-stage investments in technology and consumer companies. At Athena Consulting, I worked as a Senior Associate, providing strategic advisory services to clients in the technology and industrial sectors.

My educational background includes a Bachelor of Arts in Psychology from Bowden College. This diverse experience has equipped me with the skills and insights necessary to identify and support exceptional founders like Mr. Zhao.

I first became acquainted with Mr. Zhao through his role as the Co-Founder and Chief Technology Officer (CTO) of Orenda AI, a portfolio company of Apex10 Ventures. Orenda AI is a groundbreaking software company that provides an all-in-one business management platform for lesson-based businesses, such as tutoring centers, music schools, and art studios. The platform integrates scheduling, billing, payments, notifications, staff hour tracking, customer relationship management (CRM), and information access into a unified system.

As the CTO of Orenda AI, Mr. Zhao has been instrumental in developing and scaling the company's innovative platform. His technical expertise and leadership have been critical in building a robust and scalable software architecture that can support the complex needs of lesson-based businesses. Mr. Zhao's contributions to Orenda AI have been nothing short of extraordinary. He has led the development of key features and functionalities that have significantly enhanced the platform's capabilities and user experience. His deep understanding of the unique challenges faced by lesson-based businesses has enabled him to design and implement solutions that address their specific needs.

One of Mr. Zhao's most notable achievements at Orenda AI is the development of the platform's intelligent scheduling and resource allocation system. This system leverages advanced algorithms and machine learning techniques to optimize the scheduling of lessons, instructors, and resources, ensuring maximum efficiency and utilization. By automating and streamlining these processes, Mr. Zhao has helped Orenda AI's customers save significant time and resources, allowing them to focus more on delivering high-quality instruction.

Mr. Zhao has also been a driving force behind the development of Orenda AI's comprehensive CRM and communication tools. These tools enable lesson-based businesses to effectively manage their customer relationships, track student progress, and communicate with clients and instructors. By providing a centralized platform for managing all aspects of their operations, Mr. Zhao has empowered Orenda AI's customers to deliver a more personalized and engaging experience for their students.

In addition to his technical contributions, Mr. Zhao has played a key role in shaping Orenda AI's product vision and strategy. His deep industry knowledge and insights have been invaluable in identifying new opportunities and areas for growth. Mr. Zhao's ability to anticipate and respond to the evolving needs of lesson-based businesses has been a major factor in Orenda AI's success.

Under Mr. Zhao's leadership, Orenda AI has achieved significant traction and growth. The company has successfully onboarded numerous customers across various sectors, including tutoring centers, music schools, and art studios. Orenda AI's platform has been widely praised for its ease of use, flexibility, and comprehensive feature set. Customers have reported significant improvements in their operational efficiency and customer satisfaction as a result of using the platform.

Mr. Zhao's remarkable achievements at Orenda AI have not gone unnoticed. The company has received significant recognition and support from the venture capital community. Apex10 Ventures, along with other leading investors, has provided substantial funding to support Orenda AI's growth and expansion. This investment is a testament to the confidence that the investor community has in Mr. Zhao's leadership and the potential of Orenda AI's platform.

In conclusion, Mr. Jianli Zhao is an extraordinary individual whose remarkable skills and accomplishments in the field of software engineering and product development have left an indelible mark on the industry. His outstanding expertise and visionary contributions make him an invaluable asset to the United States. Mr. Zhao's ability to drive innovation, develop cutting-edge solutions, and lead high-performing teams sets him apart as a truly exceptional talent. I wholeheartedly recommend Mr. Zhao for the O-1 visa, as his continued presence in the United States will undoubtedly contribute to the growth and success of the technology sector and the broader economy.

If you require any additional information or clarification regarding my recommendation of Mr. Zhao, please do not hesitate to contact me. I would be more than happy to provide further details or answer any questions you may have.

Sincerely,

Grace LindenPartnerApex10 Venturesgrace@apex10.vc
final:
Dear USCIS,

I am thrilled to support Mr. Jianli Zhao's visa application with utmost enthusiasm. Mr. Zhao is an extraordinary professional in software engineering and product development, particularly in Real-Time Data, where his remarkable accomplishments have significantly impacted the industry. His exceptional expertise and pioneering contributions make him a significant asset to the United States.

As a Partner at Apex10 Ventures, a venture capital firm based in Los Angeles, I have had the privilege of working closely with Mr. Zhao and witnessing firsthand his extraordinary abilities and contributions. Apex10 Ventures focuses on investing in early-stage companies that are transforming traditional industries through automation and technology. Our portfolio includes innovative companies across various sectors, such as finance, healthcare, logistics, and education.

In my role, I am responsible for sourcing, evaluating, and supporting our portfolio companies. I work closely with founders and management teams to help them scale their businesses and achieve their strategic goals. I also lead our due diligence efforts and provide guidance on product development, go-to-market strategy, and operational execution. My previous experience in venture capital and technology investing, including roles at Linkbridge Capital and Athena Consulting, has equipped me with the skills and insights necessary to identify and support exceptional founders like Mr. Zhao.

I first became acquainted with Mr. Zhao through his role as the Co-Founder and Chief Technology Officer (CTO) of Orenda AI, a portfolio company of Apex10 Ventures. Orenda AI is a groundbreaking software company offering an all-in-one business management platform for lesson-based businesses, such as tutoring centers, music schools, and art studios. The platform integrates scheduling, billing, payments, notifications, staff hour tracking, customer relationship management (CRM), and information access into a unified system.

As the CTO of Orenda AI, Mr. Zhao has been instrumental in developing and scaling the company's innovative platform. His technical expertise and leadership have been critical in building a robust and scalable software architecture that supports the complex needs of lesson-based businesses. His contributions to Orenda AI have been nothing short of extraordinary. He has led the development of features that have significantly enhanced the platform's capabilities and user experience, addressing specific needs of lesson-based businesses through understanding their unique challenges.

Notably, Mr. Zhao developed the platform's intelligent scheduling and resource allocation system, which uses advanced algorithms and machine learning to optimize lesson scheduling, instructor deployment, and resource utilization, delivering substantial time and resource savings for Orenda AI's customers. Additionally, his work has been pivotal in creating comprehensive CRM and communication tools that empower businesses to manage customer relationships, track student progress, and coordinate communications effectively, thus delivering a more personalized and engaging experience for students.

Beyond his technical contributions, Mr. Zhao has shaped Orenda AI's product vision and strategy. His deep industry knowledge and insights have been invaluable in identifying growth opportunities, and his ability to anticipate and respond to evolving business needs has been crucial to Orenda AI's success.

Under Mr. Zhao's leadership, Orenda AI has achieved significant growth, with customers spanning various sectors including tutoring centers, music schools, and art studios. The platform's ease of use, flexibility, and comprehensive feature set have earned widespread praise, improving operational efficiency and customer satisfaction for its users.

Moreover, Mr. Zhao's work has had a transformative impact on Real-Time Data Systems Engineering and Product Development, setting new benchmarks for processing and resource optimization. By employing advanced algorithms and cutting-edge machine learning techniques, Mr. Zhao has expanded the horizons of real-time data management. His pioneering work in intelligent scheduling and resource allocation has streamlined business operations and redefined industry standards for efficiency. This advancement allows businesses using Orenda AI's platform to convert data into dynamic, actionable insights, enhancing their operational adaptability and market responsiveness. Additionally, his integration of comprehensive CRM and communication tools demonstrates a commitment to providing holistic solutions that improve user engagement and operational effectiveness. By unifying these tools with real-time data functionalities, Mr. Zhao has enabled a seamless operational framework, where businesses can manage relationships and educational progress with remarkable clarity and efficiency. His contributions represent significant value for users and groundbreaking advancements for the application of real-time data across diverse sectors, making complex data systems more accessible and stimulating industry innovation.

Mr. Zhao's remarkable achievements at Orenda AI have garnered significant recognition, culminating in a noteworthy investment of $3 million from Apex10 Ventures. This investment highlights both the exceptional promise of Orenda AI and the outstanding leadership demonstrated by Mr. Zhao. At Apex10 Ventures, we are committed to a rigorous and highly selective investment process, focusing on early-stage companies that are at the forefront of transforming traditional industries through automation and innovative technologies. Receiving investment from our firm is a mark of distinction, reflecting a startup's alignment with our vision and criteria for revolutionary potential and sustainable growth.

This prestigious investment is a testament to Mr. Zhao's strategic foresight and technical ingenuity, particularly his work on intelligent scheduling systems and resource optimization tools, which have positioned Orenda AI as a trailblazer in technological advancement with concrete, real-world impacts. These innovations yield substantial efficiency and scalability improvements for lesson-based businesses, positioning Orenda AI as not just a software platform, but a transformational business tool. By securing backing from Apex10 Ventures and garnering interest from other leading investors, Mr. Zhao's leadership is affirmed, showcasing his pivotal role in driving Orenda AI's current success and underscoring its potential for tremendous growth in the fast-evolving realm of real-time data systems.

In brief, Mr. Zhao is an extraordinary individual whose remarkable skills and accomplishments in the field of real-time data software engineering and product development have left an indelible mark on the industry. His outstanding expertise and visionary contributions make him an invaluable asset to the United States. Mr. Zhao's ability to drive innovation, develop cutting-edge solutions, and lead high-performing teams sets him apart as a truly exceptional talent. I wholeheartedly recommend Mr. Zhao for the visa, as his continued presence in the United States will undoubtedly contribute to the growth and success of the technology sector and the broader economy.

Please feel free to contact me if you need any more information or clarification regarding my recommendation for Mr. Zhao. I am more than willing to provide further details or address any questions you may have.

Respectfully,

Grace LindenPartnerApex10 Ventures[email contact here]
